title: Medvedev says the players are ready to play less, even if it means earning less
description: The Russian, speaking on Roland-Garros media day, said the locker-room consensus is that the tennis season should be shortened – and that most players would accept a pay cut to make it happen.

title: “I didn’t know if I would be able to play or not”: Djokovic, 39, arrives at Roland-Garros on barely a season
description: Since his Australian Open final loss in January, the 24-time Grand Slam champion has played exactly two competitions – Indian Wells and Rome – separated by nine weeks of rehabilitation. On his 39th birthday in Paris, he conceded he wasn't sure he'd be here at all.
